title: Live-Log Debugging Pipeline
summary: Run backend + frontend as background processes, monitor backend logs with grep filters, execute real workflows to surface root causes in one session.
body: Set up a backend + frontend dev environment with a persistent monitor task filtering backend logs to `[analyze]|[expandedSearch]|[ats]|...` patterns, then ran actual searches in the browser. Real logs surfaced multiple root causes in one session: substring matching bugs, JSON parsing failures, and token-cap truncation. This pattern is high-leverage for debugging production-like issues without instrumentation or trace collection. Applied in RoleNext to debug post-redesign stability issues in the search pipeline.
